Package recoder.util

Class OptionManager

java.lang.Object
recoder.util.OptionManager
public class OptionManager extends Object
provides methods for dealing with command line arguments.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    OptionManager.OptionDescription
    describes a single command line option.

    • addOption

      public void addOption(int type, String shortOpt, String longOpt, String description)

      public void addOption(int type, int multiplicity, String shortOpt, String longOpt, String description)
      adds the given option to the registered ones

    • parseArgs

      public String[] parseArgs(String[] args) throws UnknownOptionException, OptionMultiplicityException, IllegalOptionValueException, MissingOptionValueException, MissingArgumentException
      parses all the options within the given arguments and return the remaining unparsed arguments.
      Throws:
      UnknownOptionException
      OptionMultiplicityException
      IllegalOptionValueException
      MissingOptionValueException
      MissingArgumentException
